cycles_used.description: How many cycles the run used.

lessons.description: Up to 5 concise TASK-AGNOSTIC lessons. Generalize specifics into reusable patterns. Bad: 'YouTube URL was wrong'. Good: 'Verify URLs match goal before hardcoding'.

actor_prompt_rewrite.description: Full new actor system prompt. Must be same size or shorter. PRESERVE two-tier structure: generic rules + app-specific sections. NEVER delete app sections just because current goal didn't use them. Only delete if PROVEN WRONG.

planner_prompt_rewrite.description: Full new planner system prompt. Must be same size or shorter. PRESERVE two-tier structure: generic rules + app-specific sections. NEVER delete app sections just because current goal didn't use them. Only delete if PROVEN WRONG.

actor_schema_rewrite.description: Full new actor_schema.json content if the actor output format needs to change (add/remove/rename fields). Empty string if no change. Must be valid JSON schema.

planner_schema_rewrite.description: Full new planner_schema.json content if the planner output format needs to change. Empty string if no change. Must be valid JSON schema.

patterns_that_worked.description: Action patterns that succeeded. Phrase generically for reuse across tasks.

patterns_that_failed.description: Action patterns that failed or caused loops. Phrase generically for reuse across tasks.
